creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I don't understand why it is needed.
rubygem-ffi-compiler should be there already.
If not, ports framework will install it.

% cd /usr/ports/net/rubygem-http-parser
% pkg info rubygem-ffi-compiler
pkg: No package(s) matching rubygem-ffi-compiler
% make
...
===>  Staging for rubygem-http-parser-1.2.3
===>   rubygem-http-parser-1.2.3 depends on package: rubygem-ffi-compiler>=1.0<2.0 - not found
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/rubygem-ffi-compiler-1.0.1.pkg
[pkg.foo.bar] Installing rubygem-ffi-compiler-1.0.1...
[pkg.foo.bar] Extracting rubygem-ffi-compiler-1.0.1: .......... done
===>   rubygem-http-parser-1.2.3 depends on package: rubygem-ffi-compiler>=1.0<2.0 - found
===>   Returning to build of rubygem-http-parser-1.2.3
===>   rubygem-http-parser-1.2.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ruby27 - found
===>   rubygem-http-parser-1.2.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/gem - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
(cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/rubygem-http-parser/work/http-parser-1.2.3; /usr/bin/env RB_USER_INSTALL=yes LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 /usr/local/bin/gem install -l --no-update-sources --install-dir /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/rubygem-http-parser/work/stage/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/2.7 --ignore-dependencies --bindir=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/rubygem-http-parser/work/stage/usr/local/bin --no-document http-parser-1.2.3.gem -- )
Building native extensions. This could take a while...
Successfully installed http-parser-1.2.3
1 gem installed
...
